reviews.title: Great earbuds that fit well, sound good, and have long battery life!
reviews.text: The earbuds have pretty good sound and the main reason I love them is most earbuds don't fit well in my ears, but the ear fins make it snug and a good fit. They are fairly easy to connect to bluetooth devices. The case seems to hold a lot of battery and lasts a long time and I like that it charges with USB-C. The ear fins on the earbuds make it very snug and a good fit in my ears, and this also makes it noise cancelling. The case is a nice small size too. I've used it for almost a month and I have no complaints about them :)

Bluetooth Earbuds.
Fantastic. I bought a bunch of them to give out to family members and to have as spares.

This set of high quality ear buds is very comparable to their super expensive counterparts as the features are mostly the same. Definitely a purchase I am happy with. Get a set for yourself and you will be happy too!

reviews.title: Excellent backup headphones
reviews.text: The thin wires look fragile, but so far so good. I had forgotten how essential good wired headphones are. I no longer make a fool of myself with audio problems during meetings.

reviews.title: Excellent product
reviews.text: I typically don't care for in-ear headphones but got these so I can talk on my cell while doing chores around the house.  They not only came the same day, but they fit my S21+ perfectly and the sound is great!  I'm so glad I took the plunge and purchased them.  Also love the little case they came with.  Great price for everything.

reviews.title: Phone does not ring in earbuds.
reviews.text: I would have given a 5-star review, but my S20 FE 5G rings out loud for everyone to hear rather than in the earbuds.  I purchased these earbuds to listen to music at the office.  When my phone rings, the volume of the ring matches the volume of the music, which would be fine, except that it's not ringing in the earbuds.  It rings out loud, which disturbs those around me.

reviews.title: Unusably uncomfortable
reviews.text:
Feels premium in the hand.
Sound amazing for in-ear headphones at this price point.
Gets unbearably uncomfortable after 10 minutes in my ears. I have normal sized ears, but the shoulder of even the smallest the ear hooks dig in and hurt terribly really quickly. Super disappointing, as the sound quality is really good for the price. Returning and continuing to use my $17 Anker buds that are as comfortable as can be (though, admittedly they have anemic bass)

reviews.title: High quality ear buds
reviews.text:
These work great on my iPhone but do not connect to my laptop. I tried everything and they won’t work on my laptop at all. They connected in seconds to my iPhone though.

The sound quality is crisp and clear. The battery life has been great and I’m overall happy with my purchase.

reviews.title: Great value for the money
reviews.text: Are use this for the gym they’re pretty comfortable and they kind of stay in my ears were none of the others do. I must have small inner ears ,but the sound is fine I haven’t spoken to anybody on the phone yet to hear if I sound clear, but as far as the music goes it does the job!

reviews.title: Fantastic headphones
reviews.text: I’m just now ordering my second pair. Original pair still work, but the cord is finally stiff and cracking after thousands of miles cycling, hiking, and hundreds of hours in the gym. I see a lot of people complaining about the mic, I don’t think I’ve ever used that function so I can’t speak to that.  However, the sound quality is better than my iPod Pros, and they still sound great at 25mph on the bike, I’ve never once had an issue with wind noise or of them falling out.  Great value for the money.

I really wish it were designed to allow a key ring or some sort of lanyard to attach to my keys.  I carry the case in pocket and always fear it falling out.

reviews.title: Outstanding value!
reviews.text: Highly recommended for anyone needing an Air Pod Pro cover!

reviews.title: Fantastic Quality And Presentation!
reviews.text:
MONOCARBON came in hot with this lite weight protective carbon fiber shell. When opening the box I was kind of surprised the presentation looked really nice. In the box was included ( Carbon Fiber Shell, Lanyard, Cards with info on it, even included a little piece of carbon fiber to keep)

The shell weight is about 8 grams, and is 0.6mm thick. The hole cutouts are precise. Seems very durable and looks like it would withstand some drops and help protect from scratches when it's inside your pocket. The include lanyard is a nice touch and it makes use with the built in lanyard spot in the AirPods itself.

I overall would recommend this product for your EDC especially if you like carbon fiber and light weight / non bulky cases.

reviews.title: A very minimal sleek case for the airPods Pro 2
reviews.text:
I have purchased this brand before for my apple watch series 6 titanium, Ive only had the shell for two days before it decided to walk away, or fell off and went byby. There was no adhesion to the watch and little effort will cause it to come off. Thank you guys for your concern about what we think about your product. Great customer service!

With that said, This case is no different with the top half, it will slip off with out you knowing.

They have no adhesive strips like others will include. I guess they have to high of confidence in their product. Nice as it is, I would expect more.

I have purchase thin strip double sided adhesive through amazon to have around when needed. This was no exception.

Now that I had to vent my concern with their product, I was prepared with handling this concern.

The bottom shell is no problem since the opening for the lanyard will secure the bottom shell, I have added a small strip of double sided adhesive to the sides of the top half shell.

These are the most minimal light weight hardshell cases you can buy, the look great and feel’s great and will take any reasonable
punishment you can give it and
protect what is important.

The packaging is nice, too nice, they could have spent less on the box and a little more on protecting the investment, like adhesive. They do have decals in a strip, if this was to prevent cases from slipping off, you could have fooled me. There was no instructions in the box on anything, 🤔.

Don’t let my concern detour you from making the investment.

title: Dekoni Audio Memory Foam Replacement Ear Pads Compatible with Sennheiser HD800 and HD800S Headphones (Elite Velour)
features: Designed and Tuned for the Sennheiser HD800 and HD800S

reviews.title: Comfortable fit
reviews.text:
They snap on easily. They are a little too thick for my taste though. You almost forget you're wearing the HD800's with the stock ear pads because of how light and thin they are. With the Dekoni's you've got memory foam cushions pushing on the sides of your head the entire time, reminding you of the giant cans on your head. They are even thicker than the pads on my HD820's. Price is a little steep but only $5 more than stock pads.

The materials feel like nice quality, similar to my HD820's. They're just not as comfortable though, in the sense that you don't forget you're wearing them like you do with the stock pads. If you have the patience, I think it's better to order genuine replacement pads from SoundSpares and just wait for them to ship from the UK. Considering the stock pads are about the same price, I think they're the better option.

reviews.title: Comfortable, not a fan of how the sound changes
reviews.text:
More comfortable than the OEM pads. Does changes the soundstage a bit while also changing the sound signature. I do notice the increase in sub-bass and increased midrange as stated in the description of these pads, but not sure if I like the trade-off of a reduced soundstage. For me, the reduced soundstage makes it sounds a bit muffled, and since I like the clear/clean sound of the basic earpads I'm not really a fan of the changes. But I guess if you want to change the sound of your hd800 then it could be good.

[EDIT] I chose to cut off the cover of the pads and used the base HD800 covers instead. I actually like it more. I wouldn't recommend others to cut their pads though as it's irreversible.

reviews.title: A no-brainer improvement for the HD800
reviews.text:
These replace the foam ear pads from your Sennheiser HD800 phones - and they're an obvious purchase for fans of these headphones. It comes delivered in a protective, flip-open box, and the pads themselves are soft and comfortable. It's every bit as nice-fitting as the original pads. But most users will probably need to do a few things to perfect the sound.

1. Adjust the EQ. If you use an HD800, you probably use either an amp or some kind of EQ setup. When you use these pads the first time, you may notice that certain music is too bassy, or has too much treble. You can easily change the sound signature by playing around with the EQ. You'll find that the bass has more presence with the Dekoni pads, but I didn't notice much change with the treble. If, however, you don't use an amp or adjust the EQ, the sound will sound better with the stock Sennheiser pads.

2. The "sticking point." Sennheiser's stock pads are soft and resilient, and designed especially for the HD800. The Dekoni pads sound equally good, but some might find the sheepskin a little "tacky" at first. (I got used to it pretty quickly.) Also, the Dekoni pads are notably more warm-feeling than the stock pads. If either of these are a problem for you, you can upgrade to the Dekoni "fenestrated" pads - or just use the Sennheiser pads.

3. Looks. No question, the leather pads are notably attractive - a real improvement over stock.

4. Installation. While Dekoni includes a plastic tool to help pry the pads, you would be well advised to watch a few videos beforehand. Dekoni didn't include an installation guide.

These pads are a no-brainer improvement over stock.

title: SIMOLIO Wireless Headphones for TV Watching with Transmitter/Charging Dock 2 in 1, 2.4G Wireless Earbuds for TV Listening, Dialog Mode & Boosted Vol & Spare Battery for Seniors, by-Pass, 100ft Range
features: WIRELESS EARPHONES FOR TV FOR HARD OF HEARING W/ TV AUDIO LISTENING ASSISTANCE - Voice clarity and noise reduction tech reduces distracting background noises and makes you hear each word spoken on your favorite show with full intelligibility. Automatic signal control tech stabilizes sudden increases in TV volume to prevent damage to your hearing. Supports optical, RCA and 3.5 mm audio outputs on most TVs. Not recommended for pacemaker carriers.

ADVANCED 2.4GHZ AUTO FHSS TECH, NO PAIRING OR DELAY, 100FT LONG TRANSMISSION - Operating on the 2.4GHz radio frequency, this tv wireless earphone has superior sound reproduction and a powerful signal that can pass through ceilings or walls. No pairing required, no lip-sync delay, no need to be facing a certain angle or position, and no interference when someone passes by.

PROFESSIONAL WIRELESS TV HEADPHONE, CUSTOMIZE THE TV SOUND TO BEST FIT YOU - people with different sound frequency sensitivities can select TONE (treble/normal/bass) to find the best parameters and hear the target source clearly. The BALANCE control is specifically designed for people with different hearing levels in the left and right ears. You can select STEREO on the transmitter to enjoy Hi-fi music or MONO to enjoy clearer TV conversations.

UNIQUE 3 IN 1 DESIGN TV HEADPHONES FOR FULL CONVENIENCE, ERGONOMIC NECKBAND & SOFT EARBUDS & SPARE BATTERY FOR LASTING TV ENJOYMENT - Transmitter, charging base and headset stand 3-in-1 design for your full convenience. The built-in rechargeable and replaceable Li-battery supports 7 hours playtime. A spare battery is always in the base charged & ready for lasting TV enjoyment. The ergonomic neckband design and ultra-soft ear tips bring you an easy and comfortable TV viewing experience.

WIRELESS EARBUDS FOR TV WITH INNOVATIVE “BY-PASS” FEATURE SUPPORTS SIMULTANEOUS AUDIO TRANSMISSION TO WIRELESS HEADPHONE AND WIRED TV SOUBNDBAR - If you only have one TV audio output and it is currently occupied by your soundbar or AV receiver, the by-pass feature can help you, and it’s the best solution for families watching TV together.

reviews.title: Nice headphone set
reviews.text: This is an excellent headphone set. reviews.title: [review for non ANC version] Pretty good deal for it's money
reviews.text:
I lost accurate track of time, but it was definitely more than 60hr of battery life. very impressive, a little scary to carry this much power on my head, but logically I understand that risks of catching fire or batteries exploding is negligible)

* sound quality - awesome (in terms of sound itself)
* build and material quality - impressive
* bluetooth connectivity - awesome. range, stability, reconnect speed, sound quality (in terms of losses via bluetooth while in varying range of "hotspot with music").
* battery quality - a little bit over a week of daily uses for 8hr+ a day. just perfect. That will be enough for a business trip out of town for a couple of days and back without need to recharge and sometimes even without prior notice to recharge before I go.
* distinct controls (bumps with space between them) - awesome. easy to use, easy to locate, no mistakes)
* folding capabilities - they do fold/unfold, but I tried it only once upon unpacking, but I rarely use this feature

The only minus that I can see in the last 20 days is how the headband is stretching when I'm wearing headphones. Looks dangerous (in terms of longevity). That's all I think. If this headphones will last more than a year I would call them perfect for a price and capabilities (tiny note about non ANC version and that's it)

So final score (while they last) 10/10

reviews.title: It is not passive soundproofing it is active. Which is NOT what I need.
reviews.text:
I have difficulty finding headphones with passive noise canceling for whatever reason and so I saw that this listing said passive and it was from the same brand as one I am still using. (It's breaking down due to age)

Active soundproofing is extremely detrimental to someone with audio disorders like myself since it makes a low buzzing noise that I can't tune out.

It does work as headphones but I would like to have it refunded so I can get another pair with the format of soundproofing I need.

reviews.title: AWESOME HEADPHONES!!
reviews.text: AWESOME headphones for music or phone calls!! Pairs up with my phone, usually within seconds. I listen to tons of YouTube music videos with these and the sound rivals more expensive sets. For the price on these you just can't go wrong!! Battery life is amazing too!!!

reviews.title: Excellent, but …..
reviews.text: Good quality sound and bluetooth……only con is they don’t keep much outside noise out including wind.

reviews.title: Decent, however.
reviews.text: I will be contacting the seller in regards to these concerns, though the Bluetooth connection to my phone is poor and seems to only want to have stable connection when i have my phone in my hands or bra. I don't feel these go as loudly as they should, when being used for exercise.

reviews.title: Just What I Wanted
reviews.text: I wanted to replace my old clunker of a boom box.  I needed a small CD player with_ a speaker so I wouldn't have to wear ear buds.  That's what I found here. At first, I wondered about the sound, but considering how small it is, the sound is fine.  I'm glad to have easier access to my CD collection.

reviews.title: Great Bluetooth CD player
reviews.text:
I have a few CDs that I have kept despite mostly using streaming services. Music not available online. This device allows me to hear them again.
Connected very easy to my Bluetooth tailgate speaker.

Don't plan on using the built in speaker as I have several better speakers that I can connect to with cable or Bluetooth.

reviews.title: Sound Quality not the best on its own speakers
reviews.text:
I found using the Aux cable along with my Bluetooth headphones the sound quality is much better.
The headphones that came with unit wasn't that good.

reviews.title: Very Good Portable CD Player With Plenty of Options
reviews.text:
With the onset of Pandora, satellite radio and many other such options, I found I wasn’t playing my CDs anymore. In fact, I couldn’t find my CD player! And the high-end system in my truck doesn’t even have a CD option. So when I saw this I figured I give it a try. I like that it’s portable and plays without skipping even when bumped, running with it, or the dog knocking it off of the table. It can be used with my several different sets of earphones. It also plugs into my truck stereo without a problem.

I also wanted it to play through its own speaker while in my crafts room. This is where the 5th star gets removed. When turning it up nearly all the way the speaker starts to buzz on certain notes. It isn’t loud at all on its own either so using it without auxiliary speakers is not good if more than about 8 feet from it. However, I am playing my CDs which I have not heard in years, and that makes me very happy.

reviews.title: Fun and good
reviews.text:
My 13 yo son is on the vintage wave, so he has been using this and the cassette one. He is happy!
Very portable, small size.
The sound is ok.
Has been using it non stop and still working good.
Would be a fun gift for someone who likes old school (on a fun way, not like a collector)
We like it.

features: PREMIUM SOUND QUALITY: These earbuds use 10 mm sound drivers to deliver full range audio with deep bass all in a compact size. The design of the JBuds Pro helps block out ambient sounds so that you can listen to your music/video’s comfortability in public places such as trains and buses.

6-HOUR PLAYTIME: Keep your music hassle-free by wirelessly linking your Bluetooth enabled device and streaming from up to 30 feet away. With up to 6 hours Bluetooth playtime of mind-blowing sound that’ll leave you with good vibes all day long.

COMFORTABLE FIT: The earbuds fit perfectly in your ears and provide a comfortable listening experience you can use all day. 3 soft silicone gel tips provide a super comfortable, noise-reducing fit and 2 Cush Fins guarantee a perfect fit.

TAKE CONTROL: The JBuds Pro are built with and in-line remote and microphone, so you can control the volume, skip tracks, activate Siri, Google Assistant and answering or hanging up calls all without taking out your phone.

TWO YEAR WARRANTY/30 DAY GUARANTEE -We are so sure you’ll be happy with your purchase that we offer a “30-Day Money-Back Guarantee” to ensure customer satisfaction of our Jlab products. Also included with our products is a 2-year limited warranty to ensure you are covered for up to two years in case any issues with our products arise.

reviews.title: Not was I was expecting
reviews.text: The reviews raved about this, but I got a different pair. There was no clip, the packaging boasted 10 hours of bluetooth. The mic didn't work for phone calls (too fuzzy). I returned these. I think their getting rid of a later edition of these headphones that aren't as good as the ones they've previously sold. You can see other reviews saying the same thing. There's no noise cancelation either. So yeah, I think they're just lying about the ones they send you.

reviews.title: These are great!
reviews.text: Great sound, and they actually fit my ears without falling out. They stay in my ears and don’t hurt even when I sleep with them on. Will buy again when these wear out!

reviews.title: ... used it I got complaints of how I sounded like I was in a
reviews.text: The first time I used it I got complaints of how I sounded like I was in a tunnel

reviews.title: These Don't last.
reviews.text:
I was pretty sad to discover that these literally lasted one road trip from Oregon to Southern California. Roughly 20hrs of drive time so I used them for music and audio books. The sound quality was okay but not great. If we had a lot of road noise I couldn't hear anything on full volume
When I tried to use them for the return trip they were even quieter and the microphone wouldn't do more then a whisper on the other end. We tried multiple phones and multiple carriers to see if that was the issue
Another issue on the 2nd round was the amount of feedback we had on the line when calling or even listening to music. I thought my phone was broken or something till I turned my Bluetooth off and just used my phone speaker. I was really excited for this but won't buy them again.

reviews.title: I do not recommend these earbuds.  They have a serious design flaw.
reviews.text:
I would have easily given these earbuds 4 or 5 stars, if it wasn't for the "low battery" warning. JLAB clearly put no thought into this. Here are my issues:

1) The first low battery warning occurs about 5 minutes before the battery dies . So if you just started your jog, or just got on the bus, you're screwed. With 6 hours of play time, the low battery notification should give you at least 20 minutes notice. Since you are almost always "out and about" when listening to headphones, it would be nice to have enough juice to finish your activity or get where you are going.

2) The low battery message (which is verbal) repeats FREQUENTLY for the brief remainder of your battery life, constantly interrupting your music. This is so annoying you wind up taking the earbuds off.

Since the earbuds are essentially useless once you get the first low battery warning, the warning serves no purpose. Giving the low battery warnings at the 30, 20 and 10 minute marks would be far less annoying and actually give you a chance to get to a charger.
